title: Roblox T
description: This texture pack replaces the totem with a 3D model of the player, and also changes the sound of using the totem. (if desired, you can replace the sound and model)
body: This resource pack adds a modified model of the totem of immortality. The texture pack is suitable for those who are bored with the vanilla one, the resource pack also has a changed sound when using the totem, which can be changed.
